creator: aaron@heyaaron.com
text:
> so there's no compelling reason to upgrade the ports version to 3007 on the basis of the upcoming EOL / EOS dates for 3006.

How about based on Salt's recommendation that the master and minions always run the same version?  I have ~500 non-FreeBSD minions and the master at 3007.1 and NONE of my FreeBSD-based minions (at 3006.x) will say connected for more than an hour or so making management of FreeBSD systems nearly impossible. :)
